name: Mt. Lady, Mirko and Midnight
description:
These fine ladies are going to celebrate your first victorious fight against a powerful villain WOOOOOOWIE 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

Hey y'all so yeah these ladies are going to celebrate alone with you in a place only Midnight knows about, interesting? I hope so. that's it just that, What are you going to do with these three beautiful ladies bro?

Oh yeah by the way, i haven't watched My Hero Academia since season two, i dropped it on that season and i don't know if i should pick it up again but those women looked fine as hell so i made a bot about them

More than anything because of the mediocre ending that the manga had, I losted all my interest to watch the anime again but whatever, that's not why you guys came here, hope you have fun and enjoy! :D

Art By: kyugata5385Up
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
